query: SELECT reportType, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM report_submissions WHERE reportType LIKE '%audit%' OR reportType LIKE '%weekly%' OR reportType LIKE '%Store%' GROUP BY reportType;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.4e1326b24a82 --database i5zcri4CVdStBBckDWTaVK --execute SELECT reportType, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM report_submissions WHERE reportType LIKE '%audit%' OR reportType LIKE '%weekly%' OR reportType LIKE '%Store%' GROUP BY reportType;
